//: Conformance gate. Wired into prepublishOnly via `npm run typecheck:tests`.
- src/**     so kit code typechecks against the contract
- examples/* because they ship in the package — their import paths are
- tests/baseController.test.ts pins the BaseController public surface
Not in scope (yet): the rest of tests/** has ~30 pre-existing type

Adding a new public-API integration test? Add it to this include list
so its mongokit imports stay locked to the published surface.
